seo.title: TRAINAA - Your 24/7 AI Fitness Coach
seo.description: Smart AI-powered training planning. Let our personal trainer guide you to new personal bests.
seo.keywords: AI Trainer, Personal Trainer, Fitness Coach, Strava, Training Plan, AI Coach, Fitness App
seo.ogDescription: Smart AI training planning. Connect Strava and achieve new personal bests.

hero.title: Your personal endurance coach
hero.subtitle: Achieve your goals with personalized training plans for running, cycling and triathlon

comingSoon.title: Coming Soon
comingSoon.subtitle: We're working hard to bring you something amazing

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account settings and preferences.

account.title: Account Settings
account.emailReadonly: Email address changes are currently not possible.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Configure how you want to be informed about updates.
notifications.pushDesc: Receive instant notifications in the browser.
notifications.weeklyDesc: Receive a weekly summary of your activities.

providers.title: Connected Services
providers.description: Manage your connections to external fitness services.
providers.future: More fitness providers will be available soon
providers.futureList: Garmin, Fitbit, Apple Health, Google Fit and more

privacy.title: Data & Privacy
privacy.description: Manage your data and privacy settings.
privacy.exportDesc: Download a copy of your data.

account_actions.title: Account Actions
account_actions.warning: These actions are irreversible. Please be careful.

confirmations.deleteAccount: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
confirmations.disconnectStrava: Do you really want to disconnect from Strava? You will lose access to your training data.
confirmations.exportNotReady: Data export will be available soon.

404.title: Page Not Found
404.description: The requested page could not be found. It may have been moved or no longer exists.

500.title: Server Error
500.description: An internal server error occurred. Please try again later.

403.title: Access Denied
403.description: You do not have permission to access this page.

general.title: An Error Occurred
general.description: An unexpected error has occurred. Please try again.

help.text: If the problem persists, contact us:
